name: Tofas Turk Otomobil Fabrikasi A.S.
summary: Tofas T√É¬ºrk Otomobil Fabrikasi A.S. manufactures and sells passenger cars and light commercial vehicles in Turkey. It also produces various automotive spare parts, as well as trades in automobile and spare parts; and provides consumer financing services. The company offers its products under the Fiat, Fiat Professional, Alfa Romeo, Jeep, Ferrari, and Maserati, as well as Opar and Magneti Marelli brands. Tofas T√É¬ºrk Otomobil Fabrikasi A.S. also exports its products. The company was incorporated in 1968 and is headquartered in Istanbul, Turkey.
